content.full_text:
Mr. John Larson
Director
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 
95804
Dear John:
Thanks for your offer of assistance with settling the
question of reporting for tegislators and other officials
who receive parking passes for the Courtesy parking Lot at
the California !{useum of Scj,ence and Industry.
The passes are issued each August for the following year and
include museum staff, donors, corporate sponsors oi -
exhibits, volunteers and public officials.
we have received some inguirj-es from legislators lrith regard
to what amount they should include in their financial
reports for recej-pt of the passes. The infomation they
have received has varied as there are numerous ways of
calculating the va1ue. It could be:
1. 9t per day - as that is the normal amount collected
at the gate.
2. Nothi,ng - if the pass is never used!
3. $550.00 - the amount a Foundation menber (donor)
must contribute in order to receive a pass.
4. $25,000 - the amount a corporation rnay have
contributed for exhibit upkeep or maintenance.
A copy of last yearrs policy is encLosed for your perusal .
If you could get a letter or opinion to us that $/e could
include in the maili,ng with the passes, that would certainly
be helpful .
February 16, 1990
to do business with youl
Deputy Director for External Affairs
